headline: Zoetis Probe Tests Guidance Credibility And Long Term Investor Confidence
summary: Zoetis (NYSE:ZTS) is facing an investigation into potential securities fraud tied to a sharp guidance cut following earlier positive comments about its outlook. The probe focuses on whether prior statements about growth prospects were misleading and if investors received a full and timely picture of the company’s expectations. This development raises fresh questions about management credibility, disclosure practices, and possible legal and regulatory consequences for Zoetis. Zoetis focuses...

headline: Zoetis to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
summary: PARSIPPANY, N.J., May 21, 2026--Zoetis Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) today announced that a representative of the company will participate in fireside chats at the following investor conferences.

headline: Michael Burry buys beaten-down, forgotten fintech stock
summary: While the rest of the market has been chasing AI, Michael Burry spent his Monday evening on Substack explaining why he has been buying the stocks everyone else is ignoring. He has a name for what he is seeing. And it is not a phrase Wall Street has used before. Burry disclosed in a Substack post on ...
